items.name: CVE-2026-56155

type.en: Exploited vulnerability · Microsoft Active Directory Federation Services
type.ru: Эксплуатируемая уязвимость · Microsoft Active Directory Federation Services

items.desc: Microsoft Active Directory Federation Services contains an insufficient granularity of access control vulnerability that allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

items.name: CVE-2026-56164
items.desc: Microsoft SharePoint contains a missing authentication for critical function vulnerability that allows an unauthorized attacker to elevate privileges over a network.

items.name: CVE-2026-15409
items.desc: SonicWall SMA1000 Appliances contain a server-side request forgery vulnerability that could allow a remote unauthenticated attacker to potentially cause the appliance to make requests to unintended location.

items.name: CVE-2026-15410
items.desc: SonicWall SMA1000 Appliances contain a code injection vulnerability which in specific conditions could potentially enable a remote authenticated attacker as administrator to execute arbitrary OS commands.

items.name: CVE-2008-4128
items.desc: Cisco IOS 12.4 contains multiple cross-site forgery vulnerabilities that allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary commands via (1) a certain "show privilege" command to the /level/15/exec/- URI, and (2) a certain "al

items.name: CVE-2026-56291
items.desc: Balbooa Forms contains an unrestricted upload of file with dangerous type vulnerability that allows an unauthenticated arbitrary file upload which could allow uploading of executable files leading to full RCE.

items.name: CVE-2026-48939
items.desc: iCagenda contains an unrestricted upload of file with dangerous type vulnerability that allows the upload of arbitrary files in the file attachment feature, ultimately resulting in PHP code upload and execution.

items.name: CVE-2026-48908

type.en: Exploited vulnerability · JoomShaper SP Page Builder
type.ru: Эксплуатируемая уязвимость · JoomShaper SP Page Builder

items.desc: JoomShaper SP Page Builder contains an unrestricted upload of file with dangerous type vulnerability that allows unauthenticated users to upload arbitrary files, ultimately resulting in the upload and execution of PHP co

items.name: CVE-2026-55255
items.desc: Langflow contains an authorization bypass through user-controlled key vulnerability which allows an authenticated attacker to execute any flow belonging to another user by specifying the victim's flow ID in the request.

items.name: CVE-2026-56290
items.desc: Joomlack Page Builder contains an improper access control vulnerability that could allow for remote code execution via unauthenticated arbitrary file upload.

items.name: CVE-2026-48282
items.desc: Adobe ColdFusion contains a path traversal vulnerability that could lead to arbitrary code execution in the context of the current user.

items.name: CVE-2026-45659
items.desc: Microsoft SharePoint Server contains a deserialization of untrusted data vulnerability which allows an authorized attacker to execute code over a network.
